hooks.command: python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/chat2skill_hook.py" user-prompt-submit || python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/chat2skill_hook.py" user-prompt-submit || py -3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/chat2skill_hook.py" user-prompt-submit
python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/chat2skill_hook.py" stop || python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/chat2skill_hook.py" stop || py -3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/chat2skill_hook.py" stop

python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/chat2skill_hook.py" stop-response-guard || python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/chat2skill_hook.py" stop-response-guard || py -3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/chat2skill_hook.py" stop-response-guard
